message:
🐛 Forward user IP to GA4 for correct geolocation (#1291)

Analytics proxy was sending requests to GA4 from the server's IP,
causing all users to appear from the US datacenter. Add _uip parameter
and X-Forwarded-For header to forward the user's real IP for accurate
geographic attribution.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
